title.en: Ye Tian also came here and attracted the attent...

content.en:
Boom Boom Boom !!!

In front of a relatively intact building, a group of True Monarchs were constantly attacking the formation of this building.

The ruins of those buildings are not good, they are probably destroyed in battle, or collected by the enemy, and even if there are some treasures, they are basically mutilated.

As a result, the other True Monarchs set their sights on these intact buildings after exploring the ruins of some buildings.

For example, the building in front of you, which occupies a radius of thousands of miles, is definitely above the middle among many buildings, and it is estimated that there are a lot of good things in it, once you break the formation and enter the building, you can get some gains.

Wow!

Ye Tian also came here and attracted the attention of many True Monarchs.

"I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws!"

This group of true monarchs said politely.

They were a little afraid of Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian was a true monarch, and his strength was much stronger than them.

If Ye Tian made a move on them, they would not be opponents.

"Let's shoot together, break the formation, and whoever finds the treasure will belong to whoever finds it!"

Ye Tian said.

As soon as these words came out, the other true monarchs were much more relieved.

Thundered!!!

Many True Monarchs shot out in unison, and with Ye Tian, the True Monarch, the True Monarch on the list, in less than three hours, the formation of this building was completely broken.

Immediately, a group of True Monarchs poured into the building.

There are passages inside the building, and there are dangers inside.

Soon after entering the building, some True Monarchs encountered a group of puppets.

Although there are sect forces that are proficient in puppets in the chaos, the puppets are not powerful, at most they are comparable to some Heavenly Monarchs, and stronger puppets are rare.

The value of some puppets that can be comparable to the true monarch's powerhouse is basically comparable to a top-notch half-dao weapon, and there is no market price.

I don't know how many strong people want to buy a puppet to be a guard for their juniors, so that they can protect their juniors.

But now, such rare True Monarch puppets abound here.

Moreover, the puppets here are all powerful, even more powerful than the powerful True Monarch.

However, the true monarchs who can enter the ruins are very powerful, and only the top 100,000 true monarchs in the entire quasi-dao realm are qualified to enter here, and if they are placed in the chaos, they are all the top true monarchs who are famous in countless realms.

Therefore, one of them was enough to deal with a group of ordinary True Monarchs, and it was naturally not a problem to deal with some powerful True Monarch puppets.

But the point is that the materials of these puppets are very extraordinary, and it is difficult to destroy them, so if they are surrounded by many puppets, they will fall into a protracted battle for a while, which is not conducive to their search for treasures.

Not long after Ye Tian entered, he chose a passage, and soon encountered dozens of puppets intercepting him.

"Puppets, it's rare!"

Ye Tian looked at the dozens of puppets in front of him and was very surprised.

When the puppets rushed over, he slashed them with a knife, directly slashing them away, and leaving a series of knife marks on their bodies, but he did not cut them off.

"The defense is very strong!"

Ye Tian had a hint of interest.

Although he didn't use all his strength, the attack just now was enough to kill a powerful True Monarch, but it didn't kill these puppets.

If there are enough of such puppets, they can really pose a threat to a True Ancestor.

Immediately, Ye Tian struck with all his strength and directly slashed a puppet into pieces.

Soon after, all of these golems were destroyed.

In fact, Ye Tian also wanted to live these puppets, but if he was alive, these puppets would always resist, and these puppets were different from cultivators, they couldn't control their souls or become seriously injured and dying.

So, he can only destroy them.

After destroying these puppets, Ye Tian didn't have time to study, so he directly put away their fragments, and then began to search for treasures.

Searching through the secret rooms, rooms, and halls, Ye Tian really found a lot of good things.

For example, some cultivation resources, some weapons, as well as some classic secret arts, as well as a few chaotic supernatural inheritances, and so on.

But what made Ye Tian a little disappointed was that the things here were basically limited to the True Monarch level, and there were almost no things that were useful to the True Ancestor.

Obviously, this should be the residence of some powerful True Monarch.

And this top True Monarch should still have a group of weak True Monarch servants and Heavenly Monarch servants, but I don't know what happened, these people all fell and died.

In the process of searching, Ye Tian also destroyed about a hundred puppets.

At this time, Ye Tian was even more curious.

A top-notch True Monarch has so many puppets, which in itself is an unimaginable wealth!

He also knew the value of a True Monarch puppet in Chaos, and these were not ordinary True Monarch puppets, and their value was even more unimaginable.

A puppet is equivalent to a top-notch half-way, and so many puppets are equivalent to how many half-wayers!

That's an unimaginable amount of money!

And this wealth belongs to a top true monarch, isn't it too strange?

"Could it be that this sect is good at refining puppets? Therefore, a top True Monarch can also obtain a large number of True Monarch puppets?"

Ye Tian guessed.

Meanwhile.

Outside the Quasi-Dao Realm, a group of top True Ancestors were also using special methods to observe the situation inside the ruins.

When they saw these puppets, they were all very moved.

"True Monarch Puppet, so many True Monarch Puppets are too valuable, I really want to enter now!"

"It's useless to go in, this kind of true monarch puppet, if there is no way to make it recognize the master, then it can only be destroyed. The True Monarch Puppets that have been destroyed are of little value!, and I have found that these True Monarch Puppets should be as set by their original owners, and attack as soon as they find an intruder, even if their owners fall, this process continues. In general, this batch of puppets can only be re-recognized unless they are captured alive and then their procedures are changed, but the power that can refine the True Monarch puppets in large numbers is not simple, so naturally it is impossible to easily change the procedures. Therefore, no matter how precious these True Monarch puppets are, they can only be destroyed!"

"There may be some unclaimed puppets inside this ruin, and if you get one, you can earn it!"

"What the hell is going on with this ruin, how can there be so many True Monarch puppets, even the Puppet Holy Sect, one of the top powers, can't create so many True Monarch puppets, right?"

"The Dao Ancestors didn't reveal the news either, it is estimated that there are some secrets involved!"

The True Ancestors chatted and paid attention to the situation of the ruins.

And at this time.

Ye Tian came to the bedroom residence of the top true monarch of the building owner.

Here he discovers an astonishing secret.
